'''databa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cableman|cableman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cableman|cableman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| databa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dætæbæth|dætæbæth]] || [[word:dætæbæj|dætæbæj]] || [[word:dætæbæsh|dætæbæsh]] || [[word:dætæbæ|dætæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:datatabath|datatabath]] || [[word:datatabaj|datatabaj]] || [[word:datatabash|datatabash]] || [[word:datataba|datataba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:databath|databath]] || [[word:databaj|databaj]] || [[word:databash|databash]] || [[word:databa|databa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:datafbath|datafbath]] || [[word:datafbaj|datafbaj]] || [[word:datafbash|datafbash]] || [[word:datafbaf|datafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:databatha|databatha]] || [[word:databaja|databaja]] || [[word:databasha|databasha]] || [[word:databaka|databaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:databath|databath]] || [[word:databaj|databaj]] || [[word:databash|databash]] || [[word:databa|databa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:databathal|databathal]] || [[word:databajal|databajal]] || [[word:databashal|databashal]] || [[word:databakal|databakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:databathatha|databathatha]] || [[word:databajaja|databajaja]] || [[word:databashasha|databashasha]] || [[word:databaka|databaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:databathan|databathan]] || [[word:databajan|databajan]] || [[word:databashan|databashan]] || [[word:databakan|databakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:databathaoro|databathaoro]] || [[word:databajaoro|databajaoro]] || [[word:databashaoro|databashaoro]] || [[word:databakaoro|databakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
